business.type_label: Cajun meat market / boudin supermarket (multi-location brand)
business.geography_hint: Scott, LA (plus locations across LA & TX)

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is checking a physical Cajun meat market/supermarket — products, store hours, locations, directions and family-heritage story ARE the decision; browsing the place is the conversion driver, not a defined-expertise sale or portfolio.

goal.one_action: Get the visitor to buy/eat the food — visit a store, shop the online store, order catering, or find products nearby

structure.archetype_note: Multi-page local-food-brand site: brand/heritage story + product grids + multi-location finder + multiple outbound commerce handoffs (shop, catering, wholesale).

mapped.observed_as: Boudin / 'Faith, Family, and good Cajun Food'
A Link from the Past (founding story, 1986)
The BEST STOPS in The Best Stop History
What's the Secret Recipe? / At the Root of It All, There is Faith

unmapped.observed: Locations page — ZIP/address + radius store-finder form returning nearby stores
unmapped.why_no_fit: Not a lead capture or map-hours single-location block; it's an interactive multi-location search widget

unmapped.observed: Locations grid where most cards link OUT to partner-operated store websites
unmapped.why_no_fit: Not a section id — a franchise/partner-location directory pattern

proposed_new.name: store-locator
proposed_new.evidence: /locations page has a ZIP/address input + radius selector to find nearby stores, plus a top-nav 'Find Products Near You' CTA — a searchable multi-location finder, distinct from single-location map-hours

confidence.why: fetch_quality full; 5 pages captured with sections, nav, CTAs, forms, proof all present and consistent

gap_findings: Store-locator (ZIP + radius search across many locations) is not expressible by closed vocab — map-hours only covers a single place's hours/directions.

Multi-goal local brand: parallel outbound commerce handoffs (Shop Now → online store, Order Catering → EZCater, Wholesale portal, Best Stop To-Geaux) mean the site is NOT one conversion action — in_icp false; taxonomy assumes a single dominant goal.
Partner/franchise location cards that redirect to independently-operated store sites are a distinct pattern from own-location listings.
